nimblestudio.launchprofile.Description.Docs: A human-readable description of the launch profile.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.Ec2SubnetIds.Docs: Unique identifiers for a collection of EC2 subnets.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.LaunchProfile.Docs: The version number of the protocol that is used by the launch profile. The only valid version is "2021-03-31".

nimblestudio.launchprofile.Name.Docs: A friendly name for the launch profile.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.StreamConfigu.Docs: A configuration for a streaming session.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.StudioCompone.Docs: Unique identifiers for a collection of studio components that can be used with this launch profile.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.StudioId.Docs: The unique identifier for a studio resource. In Nimble Studio, all other resources are contained in a studio resource.

nimblestudio.launchprofile.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
